title: NEGG Analyst Expectations and Price Targets - May 2026
text:
Newegg Commerce Analyst Coverage and Price Target Analysis from Yahoo Finance.

Current Analyst Coverage: There have not been any analyst price target forecasts for Newegg Commerce in the last 12 months, and there are currently no analyst ratings available for Newegg Commerce. Additionally, NEGG doesn't have any price targets made by Wall Street professionals.

Historical Price Targets: The most recent analyst price target on record is from February 6, 2023 by Loop Capital Markets, who expected NEGG stock to rise by 386% over the next 12 months.

Stock Forecasts and Predictions: While formal analyst ratings are absent, various forecasting models suggest mixed outlooks. The stock is expected to fall -21.38% during the next 3 months and, with a 90% probability hold a price between $32.52 and $43.67 at the end of this 3-month period.

Observation: It appears that traditional Wall Street analyst coverage for NEGG has been sparse or inactive in recent times, which is typical for smaller-cap stocks like Newegg Commerce. The lack of current analyst ratings reflects the company's volatility and lower institutional following compared to larger tech retailers.
